concept.conceptName: Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist score

en.name: Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist (ICDSC)
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context The ICDSC (Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist) is a screening tool for delirium based on DSM (Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders) criteria, designed to be completed by clinicians or nurses at the bedside using information from each 8-hour nursing shift or the previous 24 hours [1]. The checklist comprises eight items, each scored 0 or 1: - altered level of consciousness - inattention - disorientation - hallucination, delusion, or psychosis - psychomotor agitation or retardation - inappropriate speech or mood - sleep/wake cycle disturbance - symptom fluctuation The total score ranges from 0 to 8. A score ≥ 4 suggests delirium. ## Included Concepts This concept set contains the SNOMED Observable Entity concept representing the recorded ICDSC score: - `1450965` — Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist score (`1351995008`) ## References [1] Bergeron N, Dubois MJ, Dumont M, Dial S, Skrobik Y. Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist: evaluation of a new screening tool. *Intensive Care Med*. 2001;27(5):859-864. doi:10.1007/s001340100909. PMID: 11430542

fr.name: Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist (ICDSC)
fr.longDescription: ## Définition et contexte clinique L'ICDSC (Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist) est un outil de dépistage du délirium basé sur les critères du DSM (Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders), conçu pour être rempli par des cliniciens ou des infirmiers au lit du patient à partir des informations recueillies sur chaque période de 8 heures ou les 24 heures précédentes [1]. La checklist comprend huit items, chacun coté 0 ou 1 : - altération du niveau de conscience - inattention - désorientation - hallucination, délire ou psychose - agitation ou ralentissement psychomoteur - discours ou humeur inappropriés - perturbation du cycle veille-sommeil - fluctuation des symptômes Le score total varie de 0 à 8. Un score ≥ 4 suggère un délirium. ## Concepts inclus Ce concept set contient le concept SNOMED Observable Entity représentant le score ICDSC enregistré : - `1450965` — Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist score (`1351995008`) ## Références [1] Bergeron N, Dubois MJ, Dumont M, Dial S, Skrobik Y. Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist: evaluation of a new screening tool. *Intensive Care Med*. 2001;27(5):859-864. doi:10.1007/s001340100909. PMID: 11430542

createdByDetails.affiliation: Univ Rennes, CHU Rennes, INSERM, LTSI-UMR 1099, Rennes, France
createdByDetails.profession: Medical Informatics and Intensive Care Physician

versions.summary: Replaced custom INDICATE concept 2100000003 (ICDSC, vocabulary INDICATE) with SNOMED Observable Entity 1450965 (Intensive Care Delirium Screening Checklist score, code 1351995008, Non-standard). Rationale: a SNOMED equivalent now exists (added 2024-12-01) and is preferred over a custom concept. Long description updated accordingly.
